_comment: Agent investigation update — posted as thread replies to the alert message

text.text:
:mag: *Starting investigation.* Spawning 3 subagents in parallel:
• `cloudwatch-investigator` — disk metrics
• `kubectl-investigator` — node/pod state
• `otel-investigator` — checkout latency + OTel traces

wrong_hypothesis.text: Initial finding: OTel collector emptyDir buffer at 87% capacity.

text.text:
:bulb: *Initial finding:* OTel collector `emptyDir` buffer at 87% capacity.

Hypothesis: OTel collector may be the disk culprit under high trace throughput.
Investigating further...

:arrows_counterclockwise: *Hypothesis revised.*

OTel collector buffer usage (87%) is within normal range for current trace volume — it is not the cause.

New signal: `imageprovider` nginx access logs showing *340MB written in last 8 minutes* — 12x normal rate.

Re-running analysis focused on `imageprovider`...
